actionConfiguration.body:
INSERT INTO sites (
  customer_id,
  address1,
  address2,
  city,
  postcode,
  site_contact,
  contact_number,
  contact_email,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  {{appsmith.store.new_customer_id}},
  {{inp_address1.text}},
  {{inp_address2.text}},
  {{inp_city.text}},
  {{inp_postcode.text}},
  {{inp_site_contact.text}},
  {{inp_site_phone.text}},
  {{inp_site_email.text}},
  NOW()
)
RETURNING site_id, customer_id;
